notes.1.1: Found data export endpoint at src/api/export.ts with CSV/JSON support. Self-service UI at src/components/Settings/DataExport.tsx. No API-based export found.
notes.1.2: Account deletion flow at src/api/accounts/delete.ts with soft-delete + 30-day grace period. No verified/audited deletion process.
notes.1.3: Region selection at signup. `region` field on organization model at src/models/organization.ts. US and EU options available.
notes.1.4: Admin-configurable retention settings at src/components/Admin/RetentionSettings.tsx. Per-org TTL with 30/60/90/365-day options.
notes.1.5: Cookie consent via OneTrust at src/components/CookieConsent.tsx. Email preferences at src/api/preferences.ts.
notes.1.6: Password reset via email only at src/auth/reset.ts. No alternative recovery methods.
notes.2.1: Admin action logs in src/middleware/auditLog.ts. Covers user management and settings. Does not log data access or API calls.
notes.2.2: CSV/JSON log download from admin UI at src/components/Admin/AuditLogExport.tsx. Date range filtering supported.
notes.2.3: Log retention set to 90 days in src/config/logging.ts.
notes.2.4: Logs include timestamp, actor, resource, and action. No IP or session context.
notes.2.5: Basic alerting on bulk export and admin changes at src/middleware/securityAlerts.ts. Email notification to org admins.
notes.2.6: Basic rate limiting on login at src/middleware/rateLimit.ts. No behavioral detection.
notes.3.1: SAML integration via passport-saml at src/auth/saml.ts. OIDC via openid-client at src/auth/oidc.ts. No SCIM provisioning.
notes.3.2: TOTP MFA at src/auth/mfa.ts using speakeasy. Admin can enforce via org settings. No hardware key support.
notes.3.3: Configurable session timeout in src/config/session.ts (default 30min). No concurrent session limits.
notes.3.4: Admin-configurable password policy at src/auth/passwordPolicy.ts. No breach checking (HaveIBeenPwned).
notes.3.5: Google, Apple, Facebook sign-in at src/auth/social/. Account linking supported.
notes.3.6: Magic links at src/auth/magicLink.ts. No passkey support.
notes.3.7: express-rate-limit on /auth routes. IP-based with account lockout after 5 attempts.
notes.4.1: RBAC with predefined roles (admin, editor, viewer) at src/auth/roles.ts. No resource-level permissions.
notes.4.2: Casbin integration at src/middleware/authorization.ts with model at src/config/casbin-model.conf.
notes.4.3: OAuth 2.0 with JWT tokens. 1-hour expiry. Scoped to read/write/admin.
notes.4.4: New users get 'viewer' role by default in src/auth/onboarding.ts.
notes.4.5: UUIDs for all resources. Ownership checks in Casbin policies. Not field-level.
notes.5.1: PostgreSQL RLS policies in migrations/20240801_add_rls.sql. `SET app.current_tenant` in connection middleware at src/middleware/tenant.ts.
notes.5.2: Application-layer tenant filtering via Casbin. No DB-enforced RLS.
notes.5.3: Per-tenant API rate limiting at src/middleware/tenantRateLimit.ts. No compute quotas.
notes.6.1: TLS 1.3 configured in nginx.conf. HSTS header in src/middleware/security.ts. No mTLS.
notes.6.2: AWS RDS encryption at rest (platform default). No app-layer field encryption.
notes.6.3: AWS KMS for key management. No customer-triggered rotation.
notes.6.4: Using crypto module with AES-256-GCM. Documented in docs/crypto.md.
notes.7.1: Auth0 integration at src/auth/auth0.ts. Dedicated identity platform.
notes.7.3: AWS KMS via @aws-sdk/client-kms. Cloud KMS integration.
notes.7.4: Redis session store at src/config/session.ts with secure config (httpOnly, secure, sameSite).
notes.8.1: Production access requires manager approval via PagerDuty. Access logged in CloudTrail. No JIT — approval grants 24h access window.
notes.8.2: VPC with private subnets in terraform/vpc.tf. RDS in private subnet.
notes.8.3: AWS Secrets Manager referenced in src/config/secrets.ts. No automated rotation configured.
notes.8.4: Signed commits required via branch protection. Secrets pulled from AWS Secrets Manager in CI. No artifact signing or SBOM.
notes.9.1: Dependabot configured at .github/dependabot.yml. Snyk in CI at .github/workflows/security.yml.
notes.9.2: Annual pentest report at docs/security/pentest-2024.pdf. Semgrep in CI.
notes.9.3: Security section required in design doc template at docs/templates/design-doc.md. Reviewed in PR checklist at .github/pull_request_template.md.
notes.9.4: SLAs defined in docs/security/vuln-policy.md: Critical 14d, High 30d, Medium 90d.
notes.9.5: Informal service list in docs/services.md. No ownership mapping.
notes.9.6: Security issues tracked with 'security' label in Jira. No dedicated backlog.
notes.9.7: Zod schema validation at src/middleware/validation.ts for all API endpoints. No CI enforcement.
notes.10.1: security.txt at public/.well-known/security.txt. No formal VDP or bounty.
notes.10.2: Incident notification via email within 72 hours per docs/security/incident-plan.md. Status page at status.example.com.
notes.10.3: Critical vuln SLA: 7 days per docs/security/vuln-policy.md.
notes.10.4: Published post-mortems at docs/postmortems/. Template with customer-impact section. 3 post-mortems from 2024.
notes.12.1: Connected apps visible in admin UI at src/components/Admin/Integrations.tsx.
notes.12.2: OAuth tokens expire after 90 days. Refresh rotation in src/auth/oauth.ts.
notes.12.3: Predefined scopes (read, write, admin) at src/auth/scopes.ts.
notes.12.4: Logs identify which API key was used. Token metadata in audit logs.
notes.12.5: OAuth connect/disconnect events logged. No dedicated integration activity stream.
notes.12.6: Self-service revoke in admin UI. No bulk revoke or API.
